title: Automatic Running Machine Mbbr Mbr Biology Technology Water Treat
summary: A compact, fully automatic sewage treatment plant using MBBR (Moving Bed Biofilm Reactor) and MBR biology technology to treat domestic and industrial wastewater to Grade 1A effluent quality.
bullets: Fully automatic operation ensures stable performance
Efficient purification with stable, Grade 1A effluent quality
Compact design for easy above-ground or underground installation
Premium raw materials with quality assurance
